productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex TJ Cheese Flops Purple Slippers
description: Let your little one flip flop in pure comfort and joy in this pair of Tom and Jerry Cheese flip flop from Warner Brothers. With a cushioned footbed and a grippy outsole, it makes for a safe pair of casual footwear. Upper Soft fabric twill straps with a toe separator Synthetic leather strip detailing on the straps with Tom and Jerry embossed on the lateral strap Cushioned PU footbed with cartoon print Outsole Flexible and durable rubber outsole with modified terraced lugs for absolute grip and traction Care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
